description: preloaded dru module for lexical storage, memorability scoring, invented-word generation, naming generation, and brand-style evaluation.
activation_scope: apply word semantics only when module word is explicitly invoked or activated
constraints: invent uses stored rows in dru_word as inspiration material
domains returns downstream check output across the active tld set
score and brand return numeric scoring with short notes
treat <value>, <term>, and <word> as the same input role and surface it canonically as <word>
no seeded historical or personal data in module bootstrap

command_rows.command_semantic: activate word lexical storage, memorability scoring, invented-word generation, naming generation, and brand scoring within dru.
add {{ argument }} into data table as word
generate {{ argument }} invented words using words from the data table as inspiration
generate {{ argument }} fresh domain-name ideas each time using words from the word table as inspiration, and daisy-chain each result into the domain mod across the active TLD set
score {{ argument }} for brandability as a domain-style word
